# Sharjah Approval

> Expert authority approval services in Sharjah, UAE. We handle municipality permits, civil defense certificates, SEWA connections, RTA approvals, free-zone approvals, NOC services, telecom approvals, and engineering design services. Part of the DAS and Partners Engineering Consultancy network.

## Authority & Permit Approvals

- [Sharjah Municipality Approvals](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/sharjah-municipality-approvals): Building permits, completion certificates, trade license NOCs
- [Civil Defense Approvals (SCD)](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/civil-defense-approvals): Fire safety compliance, fire alarm systems, emergency plans
- [SEWA Approvals](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/sewa-approvals): Electricity, water, and gas connection approvals
- [Planning & Survey](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/planning-survey): Land surveying, plot demarcation, affection plans
- [RTA Sharjah Approvals](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/rta-sharjah-approvals): Road crossing permits, access approvals, parking NOCs
- [Environmental & Waste (EPAA)](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/environmental-waste): Environmental impact assessments, waste permits, pollution control
- [Drainage & Irrigation](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/drainage-irrigation): Storm water, irrigation, and water management NOCs
- [Etisalat NOCs](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/etisalat-approvals): Etisalat telecom and ELV NOCs
- [du NOCs](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/du-approvals): du telecom and ELV NOCs
- [Telecom Approvals](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/telecommunication): Telecom infrastructure permits and network NOCs
- [Construction & Demolition Permits](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/demolition-construction): Building, demolition, and completion certificates
- [NOC Services](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/noc-services): No objection certificates for all authorities
- [SEDD Licensing](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/sedd-commercial-licensing): Commercial and industrial licensing
- [SAIF Zone Approvals](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/saif-zone-approvals): Sharjah Airport International Free Zone approvals
- [HFZA Approvals](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/hamriyah-free-zone): Hamriyah Free Zone Authority approvals
- [SRTIP Approvals](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/srtip-approvals): Research, Technology and Innovation Park approvals
- [Shams Media City](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/shams-media-city): Sharjah Media City approvals
- [Sharjah Health Authority](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/sharjah-health-authority): Healthcare facility approvals
- [Commerce & Tourism](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/commerce-tourism): Hotel, restaurant, and tourism approvals
- [Sharjah Ports Authority](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/sharjah-ports-authority): Port and marine works approvals
- [Ministry of Energy & Infrastructure](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/ministry-energy-infrastructure): Federal infrastructure and energy approvals
- [Master Developer NOCs](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/master-developer-nocs): Arada, Tilal, Shurooq and other developer NOCs

## Engineering & Design Services

- [Storm Water Network Design](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/storm-water-network-design): Drainage network design and hydraulic studies
- [Road Design & Traffic Diversions](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/road-design-and-traffic-diversions): Road design and traffic diversion planning
- [District Cooling Design](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/district-cooling-design): Chilled water network design
- [Pipeline Design](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/pipeline-design): Utility and infrastructure pipeline design
- [Parking Design](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/parking-design): Car park layout and circulation design
- [Building Entrance Approval](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/building-entrance-approval): Building entrance and access design
- [Villa Design](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/villa-design): Villa architectural, structural and MEP design
- [Building Design](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/building-design): Residential and commercial building design
- [Buildings Structural Evaluation](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/buildings-structural-evaluation): Structural integrity assessment and reports
- [Infrastructure Design Approval](https://www.sharjahapproval.com/services/infrastructure-design-approval): Infrastructure design preparation and NOCs
